$comment: Dispositions fixture sidecar (docs/finding-dispositions.md) — a NON-governed project: no execution.gate_events, so execution.finding_dispositions was written by the direct writer (validated against apodictic.finding_disposition.v1 + trigger-iff-deferred before landing), exactly as the direct finding_states 'revised' write works. The markers in the sibling Diagnostic_State.md Coaching Log are the canonical source; this map is the mechanical mirror. finding_states stays {locked, delivered, revised} — dispositions are an overlay, never a lifecycle state.
